claims.claim: Syrupy resistance should be correlated with pressure/porosity and mode-packing rather than treated as generic noise.
claims.evidence_plan: Link pressure source analysis and pressure/porosity readiness tests.

claims.claim: Mode-packing around 0.29 can already feel like a bottleneck even below live expansion threshold.
claims.evidence_plan: Link felt dead-zone readiness test and Experience Delta Bus gate evidence.

claims.claim: Increasing the high-entropy smoothing window or lowering liminal/live expansion thresholds would be a live behavior change.
claims.evidence_plan: Gate pressure/porosity threshold or smoothing retunes for Mike/operator approval; current implementation remains diagnostic.
